name: Gravekeeper's Ambusher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>伏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; place that target on the bottom of their Deck. If this card is sent from the field to the GY after being flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Necrovalley" card in your GY; add that target to your hand. These effects are unaffected by "Necrovalley".
mnst_eff: When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; place that target on the bottom of their Deck. If this card is sent from the field to the GY after being flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Necrovalley" card in your GY; add that target to your hand. These effects are unaffected by "Necrovalley".
eff: When this card is flipped face-up: You can target 1 card in your opponent's GY; place that target on the bottom of their Deck. If this card is sent from the field to the GY after being flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Necrovalley" card in your GY; add that target to your hand. These effects are unaffected by "Necrovalley".

sets.set: Speed Duel: Arena of Lost Souls

action: Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
